isolation.credentialsScope: unique disposable account in this validator session only

assertionResults.title: Convert Recipe and Verify in List

steps.action: Attempt to establish authenticated session in dedicated browser context via /sign-up with a unique test email.
steps.expected: Sign-up completes and redirects to /dashboard with authenticated header/navigation.
steps.observed: Sign-up remained on /sign-up with disabled fields and a disabled Loading button after waiting 20s.

steps.action: Collect browser diagnostics after the stuck sign-up state.
steps.expected: No external auth challenge failures; session can proceed to protected flows.
steps.observed: Console recorded Private Access Token challenge warning and a 401 resource failure.

steps.action: Retry sign-in using the same attempted account credentials.
steps.expected: If sign-up succeeded, sign-in should establish session and allow cross-flow assertions.
steps.observed: Sign-in stayed on /sign-in with 'Couldn't find your account' and console logged a 422 request failure.

evidence.consoleErrors: Private Access Token challenge warning + 401 during sign-up, then 422 on sign-in retry (see conversion/cross-flows/browser-console-after-signin.txt).
evidence.network: Clerk sign-in request observed in network log; protected routes remained signed-out (see conversion/cross-flows/network-requests-after-signin.txt and conversion/cross-flows/protected-route-headers.txt).

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by external Clerk/Cloudflare auth challenge in headless browser; authenticated prerequisite state could not be established for this assertion.

assertionResults.title: Post-Login Redirect Preserves Intended Destination

steps.action: Open /pantry while unauthenticated in dedicated session.
steps.expected: Redirect to /sign-in before auth, then after successful sign-in return to /pantry.
steps.observed: Unauthenticated redirect to /sign-in?redirect_url=.../pantry occurred.

steps.action: Complete sign-up/sign-in to satisfy post-login redirect prerequisite.
steps.expected: Authenticated flow completes and lands on /pantry.
steps.observed: Auth could not complete: sign-up stuck Loading; sign-in retry returned account-not-found.

evidence.consoleErrors: Private Access Token challenge warning + 401 during sign-up, then 422 on sign-in retry (see conversion/cross-flows/browser-console-after-signin.txt).
evidence.network: Redirect URL evidence in conversion/cross-flows/current-url-after-pantry-open.txt; auth diagnostics in conversion/cross-flows/network-requests-after-signin.txt.

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by external Clerk/Cloudflare auth challenge in headless browser; authenticated prerequisite state could not be established for this assertion.

steps.expected: If sign-up succeeded, sign-in should establish session and allow cross-flow assertions.
steps.observed: Sign-in stayed on /sign-in with 'Couldn't find your account' and console logged a 422 request failure.

evidence.consoleErrors: Private Access Token challenge warning + 401 during sign-up, then 422 on sign-in retry (see conversion/cross-flows/browser-console-after-signin.txt).

assertionResults.title: Recipes Persist After Page Refresh

steps.action: Attempt to establish authenticated session in dedicated browser context via /sign-up with a unique test email.
steps.expected: Sign-up completes and redirects to /dashboard with authenticated header/navigation.

frictions.description: Clerk authentication flow in headless browser stalled on sign-up (Loading state), preventing authenticated navigation flows.
frictions.resolution: Retried in same dedicated session with sign-in fallback and additional waits; behavior persisted.

blockers.description: External auth challenge behavior blocked account creation/sign-in in this isolated run.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated redirect behavior, retried sign-up with unique email, waited 20s in loading state, retried sign-in with same credentials, captured console/network diagnostics and URLs.

summary: Tested 27 assertions (VAL-CROSS-013..VAL-CROSS-039): 0 passed, 0 failed, 27 blocked by inability to establish authenticated session due external Clerk challenge behavior.
